title: Better Laddering
body:
# Better Laddering Go down ladders faster when looking down!
Quark inspired ladder placement! ### Config ***config change requires restart*** **down ladder speed multiplier**
• default: 1.8
**up ladder speed multiplier**
• default: 1
check valid ladder placement
• default: true
